{"sentinel": "{\"threat_level\":\"SEVERE\",\"primary_driver\":\"excessive rain\",\"summary\":\"Heavy rainfall in Mumbai leading to soil saturation and runoff\"}", "infrastructure": "The current infrastructure in Mumbai, with a maximum drainage capacity of 45mm/hr, is likely to be overwhelmed by the heavy rainfall, leading to severe waterlogging.
